components.value: V, S, M (wine stirred with an owl’s feather)

description.value: Â This spell functions as detect magic, except that it gives you a +10 enhancement bonus on Spellcraft checks made to identify the properties and command words of magic items in your possession. This spell does not allow you to identify artifacts. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
